name: threadsme
description: ThreadsMe untuk jana story, jadual Threads, dan automasi publisher.

scripts.check: node --check app.js && node --check config.js && node --check ai-server.mjs && node --check ai-server-core.mjs && node --check server.mjs && node --check scripts/qa-smoke.mjs && node --check scripts/qa-production-safety.mjs && node --check scripts/qa-static-server.mjs && node --check scripts/qa-ui-enhancements.mjs && node --check scripts/qa-runtime-restore.mjs && node --check scripts/qa-flow-continuity.mjs && node --check scripts/restore-runtime.mjs && node --check scripts/audit-repair-stories.mjs && node --check scripts/qa-alignment.mjs && node --check scripts/backup-runtime.mjs && node --check scripts/rotate-logs.mjs
scripts.qa:all: npm run check && npm run qa:smoke && npm run qa:production && npm run qa:static && npm run qa:ui && npm run qa:restore && npm run qa:flow && npm run audit:stories

author: Akmal Marvis
